defmodule CaravelaDemoWeb.Library.AuthorLive.Form do
  @moduledoc """
  Generated by Caravela from CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library.

  LiveView that mounts the `library/AuthorForm` Svelte component via
  LiveSvelte. Handles both create (no `id` param) and edit
  (`?id=<uuid>`) flows, validation round-trips, and persistence.

  Regenerate with `mix caravela.gen.live CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library`.
  Custom code placed below the `# --- CUSTOM ---` marker is preserved.
  """

  use CaravelaDemoWeb, :live_view

  alias CaravelaDemo.Library
  alias CaravelaDemo.Library.Author

  @impl true
  def mount(params, _session, socket) do
    context = build_context(socket)
    {entity, attrs} = load_initial(params, context)

    changeset = Library.change_author(entity, attrs)

    {:ok,
     socket
     |> assign(:context, context)
     |> assign(:author, entity)
     |> assign(:attrs, attrs)
     |> assign(:changeset, changeset)
     |> assign(:errors, changeset_errors(changeset))
     |> assign(:saving, false)
     |> assign(:flash_message, nil)}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("validate", %{"field" => field, "value" => value}, socket) do
    key = String.to_existing_atom(field)
    attrs = Map.put(socket.assigns.attrs, key, value)

    changeset =
      socket.assigns.author
      |> Library.change_author(attrs)

    {:noreply,
     socket
     |> assign(:attrs, attrs)
     |> assign(:changeset, changeset)
     |> assign(:errors, changeset_errors(changeset))}
  end

  def handle_event("save", _params, %{assigns: %{author: entity}} = socket) do
    context = socket.assigns.context
    attrs = socket.assigns.attrs
    socket = assign(socket, :saving, true)

    result =
      if new?(entity) do
        Library.create_author(attrs, context)
      else
        Library.update_author(entity, attrs, context)
      end

    case result do
      {:ok, _saved} ->
        {:noreply,
         socket
         |> assign(:saving, false)
         |> push_navigate(to: "/library/authors")}

      {:error, :unauthorized} ->
        {:noreply,
         socket
         |> assign(:saving, false)
         |> assign(:flash_message, "Not authorized")}

      {:error, %Ecto.Changeset{} = cs} ->
        {:noreply,
         socket
         |> assign(:saving, false)
         |> assign(:changeset, cs)
         |> assign(:errors, changeset_errors(cs))}

      {:error, reason} ->
        {:noreply,
         socket
         |> assign(:saving, false)
         |> assign(:flash_message, "Error: " <> inspect(reason))}
    end
  end

  def handle_event("cancel", _params, socket) do
    {:noreply, push_navigate(socket, to: "/library/authors")}
  end

  @impl true
  def render(assigns) do
    ~H"""
    <LiveSvelte.render
      name="library/AuthorForm"
      props={%{
        author: @attrs,
        errors: @errors,
        saving: @saving,
        flash_message: @flash_message
      }}
    />
    """
  end

  # --- Internal --------------------------------------------------------

  defp load_initial(%{"id" => id}, context) do
    case Library.get_author(id, context) do
      nil -> {%Author{}, %{}}
      entity -> {entity, Map.from_struct(entity) |> Map.drop([:__meta__])}
    end
  end

  defp load_initial(_params, _context), do: {%Author{}, %{}}

  defp new?(%Author{id: nil}), do: true
  defp new?(%Author{}), do: false

  defp changeset_errors(%Ecto.Changeset{} = cs) do
    Ecto.Changeset.traverse_errors(cs, fn {msg, opts} ->
      [
        Enum.reduce(opts, msg, fn {k, v}, acc ->
          String.replace(acc, "%{" <> Atom.to_string(k) <> "}", to_string(v))
        end)
      ]
    end)
  end

  defp build_context(socket) do
    %{
      current_user: socket.assigns[:current_user]
    }
  end

  # --- CUSTOM ---
  # Custom code below this line is preserved on regeneration.
end

defmodule CaravelaDemoWeb.Library.AuthorLive.Index do
  @moduledoc """
  Generated by Caravela from CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library.

  LiveView that mounts the `library/AuthorIndex` Svelte component via
  LiveSvelte. List page for `authors`: renders the collection,
  handles delete, and navigates to the edit route on the `edit` event.

  Regenerate with `mix caravela.gen.live CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library`.
  Custom code placed below the `# --- CUSTOM ---` marker is preserved.
  """

  use CaravelaDemoWeb, :live_view

  alias CaravelaDemo.Library

  @impl true
  def mount(_params, _session, socket) do
    context = build_context(socket)

    socket =
      socket
      |> assign(:context, context)
      |> assign(:loading, false)
      |> assign(:flash_message, nil)
      |> assign(:authors, Library.list_authors(context))

    {:ok, socket}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("delete", %{"id" => id}, socket) do
    context = socket.assigns.context

    case Library.get_author(id, context) do
      nil ->
        {:noreply, assign(socket, :flash_message, "Not found")}

      entity ->
        case Library.delete_author(entity, context) do
          {:ok, _} ->
            {:noreply,
             socket
             |> assign(:flash_message, "Deleted")
             |> assign(:authors, Library.list_authors(context))}

          {:error, :unauthorized} ->
            {:noreply, assign(socket, :flash_message, "Not authorized")}

          {:error, reason} ->
            {:noreply, assign(socket, :flash_message, "Error: " <> inspect(reason))}
        end
    end
  end

  def handle_event("edit", %{"id" => id}, socket) do
    {:noreply, push_navigate(socket, to: "/library/authors/" <> id <> "/edit")}
  end

  def handle_event("new", _params, socket) do
    {:noreply, push_navigate(socket, to: "/library/authors/new")}
  end

  @impl true
  def render(assigns) do
    ~H"""
    <LiveSvelte.render
      name="library/AuthorIndex"
      props={%{
        authors: @authors,
        loading: @loading,
        flash_message: @flash_message
      }}
    />
    """
  end

  # --- Internal --------------------------------------------------------

  defp build_context(socket) do
    %{
      current_user: socket.assigns[:current_user]
    }
  end

  # --- CUSTOM ---
  # Custom code below this line is preserved on regeneration.
end

         |> assign(:context, context)
         |> assign(:publisher, nil)
         |> assign(:flash_message, "Not found")}

      entity ->
        {:ok,
         socket
         |> assign(:context, context)
         |> assign(:publisher, entity)
         |> assign(:flash_message, nil)}
    end
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("edit", %{"id" => id}, socket) do
    {:noreply, push_navigate(socket, to: "/library/publishers/" <> id <> "/edit")}
  end

  def handle_event("back", _params, socket) do
    {:noreply, push_navigate(socket, to: "/library/publishers")}
  end

  @impl true
  def render(assigns) do
    ~H"""
    <LiveSvelte.render
      name="library/PublisherShow"
      props={%{
        publisher: @publisher,
        flash_message: @flash_message
      }}
    />
    """
  end

  # --- Internal --------------------------------------------------------

  defp build_context(socket) do
    %{
      current_user: socket.assigns[:current_user]
    }
  end

  # --- CUSTOM ---
  # Custom code below this line is preserved on regeneration.
end
